title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Do you not know who I am?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way! Mama! That's your very own son!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! We've got some fresh cream! There's no dough, but ...Mama! Please, stop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that sweet you seek... just isn't here yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muscat! calm down! If you cover, she'll take your life span away!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Save me, Mama! I can't stop anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Run! No one can stop her now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Someone's come from the juice river!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: every- one! Out of the way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what's he got with him?! Cro- Queenbouche ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Save us! We're gonna get eaten!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He tracked down the cream puffs that were staying in that hotel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is the candy minister the one that covered them in spun sugar?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 29 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
